Super Flu | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air with the incredible duo of Super Flu. Listen to their smooth and moody mix of melodic tech house recorded at Pacha Munich.

programme.title: Edu Imbernon | DropTV | Aüra Mallorca Edition | Spain
programme.desc: Outdoor sunset session from the edge of a cliff.

programme.title: DJ Rush | Blakksheep Showcase | ADE2015 | Dockyard Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Blakksheep's showcase at Dockyard Festival was in for a perfect ending when DJ Rush stepped behind the decks. He delivered a powerful performance filled with heavy techno beats. His relentless energy spoke to his crowd, which reciprocated in ceaseless dancing and loads of hand-waving.

programme.title: Joyhauser | Loveland Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a high-octane sonic adventure with Joyhauser at Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Away To: Baadaran Airport with Pomme Rouge - By Late Knights & Creative State (Lebanon)
programme.desc: In the mountains of Baadaran in the south of Lebanon lies an abandoned airport, the perfect playground for a party, cruising through the airways with electro duo Pomme Rouge

programme.title: Various Artists | DGTL 2019 - Highlights | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Step into the vibrant world of DGTL 2019 in Amsterdam with this highlight video featuring standout sets from a cutting-edge lineup of electronic artists. Feel the pulse of the crowd, the power of the music, and the unique atmosphere that made this edition truly unforgettable.

programme.title: Ricardo Villalobos & Luciano | Love Family Park | Mainz (Germany)
programme.desc: Displaying all the skill and unique personalities that have entranced fans internationally for over a decade, Villalobos and Luciano bring the heat in this all-vinyl set.

programme.title: Steve Bug | The Art Labyrinth by dan-tz & Dance TV | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a sonic exploration with Steve Bug at The Art Labyrinth, presented by dan-tz & Dance TV in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Enzo Siragusa | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the magnetic beats of Enzo Siragusa at Music On Festival 2023 in the enchanting city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Oliver Huntemann | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin ( Germany)
programme.desc: Our next excursion with Ritter Butzke is with Oliver Huntemann at Körperwelten Berlin in Germany.

programme.title: Pacho | Birthday 2020 at Cacao Beach | Sunny Beach (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Another incredible birthday event of the established Bulgarian DJ and producer Pacho.

programme.title: Morten | UNTOLD Festival 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Morten playing on Mainstage at UNTOLD Festival 2022 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania.

programme.title: Amiti | Tau House Guatape | Colombia
programme.desc: Beautiful melodic tech performance of Amiti at Tau House Guatape, Colombia.

programme.title: I am Hardwell | Living The Dream - Documentary | Netherlands
programme.desc: Even more than the previous movie 'I AM Hardwell - Living the dream' will let you experience the music.

programme.title: Away To: Baadaran Airport with Audioblend & Whoisbibz - By Late Knights & Creative State | Lebanon
programme.desc: An abandoned airport, the perfect playground for a party.

programme.title: Roman Weber | Fairytale of the Knights | Riegersburg Castle | Austria
programme.desc: Roman Weber performs at the Riegersburg Castle on the edge of an extinct Vulcano.

programme.title: George Privatti | elrow - El Bowsque Encantado 2019 | Soho Beach DXB | Dubai (UAE)
programme.desc: Welcome to part 1 of elrow Dubai's carnival at the exclusive Soho Garden DXB venue. Let's get the party started with George Privatti and his vibrant tech house tracks rocking a dancefloor full of colourful elrow fans!

programme.title: Above & Beyond | Group Therapy 250 at The Gorge Amphitheatre | USA
programme.desc: Above & Beyond's Group Therapy 250 at The Gorge Amphitheatre, USA, marks a legendary milestone in a breathtaking setting.

programme.title: Colyn | Hangar Grand Place | Brussels (Belgium)
programme.desc: Hangar went live on June 10th with Colyn from the centre of the most important tourist destination in Brussels - The Grand Place - at sunrise.

programme.title: Various Artists | Creamfields 2018 Highlights | United Kingdom
programme.desc: Creamfields 2018 was a landmark edition celebrating the festivalâ€™s 21st anniversary in Daresbury, Cheshire.

programme.title: Alok | UNTOLD Festival 2021 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Alok live from UNTOLD Festival 2021. For the first time in Romania, the rising Brazilian artist amazed the crowd with his magical show on the mainstage.

programme.title: Alok | UNTOLD Festival 2021 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Alok live from UNTOLD Festival 2021. For the first time in Romania, the rising Brazilian artist amazed the crowd with his magical show on the mainstage.

programme.title: Alok | UNTOLD Festival 2021 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Alok live from UNTOLD Festival 2021. For the first time in Romania, the rising Brazilian artist amazed the crowd with his magical show on the mainstage.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets - Cruise Control | St. Paul Island (Malta)
programme.desc: Set sail on a sonic adventure with Tenishia at the helm, as the â€˜Chasing Sunsets - Cruise Controlâ€™ event takes you around the picturesque St. Paul Island in Malta.

programme.title: Xenia | Radio Intense | Balloon Festival | Kyiv (Ukraine)
programme.desc: Xenia heat up the winter Balloon festival for Radio Intense in Kiev, Ukraine

programme.title: Nicole Moudaber | Loveland Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Loveland Festival was in full swing when Nicole Moudaber took control of the booth. She delivered an hour of fine techno tunes, starting off with deep and dark vibes occasionally introducing sensuous vocals and building up her set towards more industrial feeling.

programme.title: Away To: Anya with Patch x Papa Soul - By Late Knights & Creative State | Faqra (Lebanon)
programme.desc: The dynamic duo of House bring on the funk to the mountaintops.

programme.title: Spartaque | Radio Intense | Barcelona (Spain)
programme.desc: Rooftop terrace session with a view.

programme.title: Will Johnston b2b Amra | Villamour | Maryland (USA)
programme.desc: Golden-hour b2b: Will Johnston Ã— Amra and friends vibe up the backyard of Villamour as the sun sets over the Patuxent River (Maryland, USA)

programme.title: Enzo Siragusa | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the magnetic beats of Enzo Siragusa at Music On Festival 2023 in the enchanting city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: MÃ‹STIZA | Night Room TV at AlcÃ¡zar de los Reyes Cristianos | CÃ³rdoba (Spain)
programme.desc: Night Room TV alongsige Concurso Nacional de Arte Flamenco de CÃ³rdoba present the live DJ set perfomance by MÃ‹STIZA at the incredible gardens of AlcÃ¡zar de los Reyes Cristianos.

programme.title: Away To: Rüdersdorf with Seth Schwarz - By Late Knights & Creative State | Germany
programme.desc: Seth Schwarz brings in sweet melodies over hard hitting beats as he blends his violin performance into his one-hour set in Rüdersdorf on the outskirts of Berlin.

programme.title: Fedde Le Grand | Darklight Sessions at ADE 2022 Part 2 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Fedde Le Grand presents Darklight Sessions at Escape, Amsterdam Dance Event 2022. Enjoy part 2.

programme.title: Giuseppe Ottaviani | Luminosity | ADE 2019 | Netherlands
programme.desc: Giuseppe Ottaviani DJ set at Luminosity, ADE 2019.

programme.title: Deep Dish | Loveland ADE | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: In one of our most epic episodes to date, we bring you coverage of one of the most anticipated sets at Loveland ADE this year by none other than newly reunited DJ duo Deep Dish.

programme.title: Patrice Baumel | Audio Obscura x Revere Series | Rotterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Electronica maestro Patrice BÃ¤umel performing a stellar sunset stream from Rotterdam's Euromast

programme.title: Matthias Tanzmann | 11 Years of Nights.ro | Bucharest (Romania)
programme.desc: Straight from his "Moon Harbour" label night at Sonar, Matthias Tanzmann touches down in Bucharest to headline Nights.ro 11 year anniversary party. And he truly rocks it with his very own blend of groovy, funky, body moving house jams.

programme.title: Roman Weber | Fairytale of the Knights | Riegersburg Castle | Austria
programme.desc: Roman Weber performs at the Riegersburg Castle on the edge of an extinct Vulcano.

programme.title: Thomas Schumacher | Brace Brace Berlin | Abandoned Industrial Complex | Germany
programme.desc: Thomas Schumacher exclusive DJ set from an abandoned industrial complex in Berlin Produced by Brace Brace Berlin.

programme.title: Claptone | Pacha On Air - Bavarian State Opera | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Imagine youÂ´re taking a walk on a quiet Saturday evening in late Munich Summer, enjoying the peace and beauty of your city. And suddenly Claptone appears.

programme.title: Etienne de CrÃ©cy | Flyin' Festival 2023 | Saint-Palais-sur-Mer (France)
programme.desc: Etienne de CrÃ©cy brought his signature French touch to the Flyin' Festival 2023 in Saint-Palais-sur-Mer.

programme.title: Format B | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: A colourful tech house set recorded from the iconic venue closed during the pandemic.

programme.title: Format B | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: A colourful tech house set recorded from the iconic venue closed during the pandemic.

programme.title: Format B | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: A colourful tech house set recorded from the iconic venue closed during the pandemic.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets at Notte Bianca | Valletta (Malta)
programme.desc: Savor the enchanting sounds of Tenishia as The Chasing Sunsets Adventures joins the Notte Bianca festivities in Malta's capital city, Valletta.

programme.title: Alex New | Freunde Legen Auf Rooftop | Cologne (Germany)
programme.desc: Cologne based Alex is deeply connected into the German underground scene playing a well balanced mixture out of deep rolling minimal sounds that never loose the dance-floor-thrive.

programme.title: Andhim | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: The next excursion with Ritter Butzke is with Andhim at the Alte Forsterei Berlin in Germany. Their sound, which they self describe as â€œSuper Houseâ€ has become it`s very own genre built from their soul and passion- party proven and of reduced nature, organic with an emphasis on the finer detail.

programme.title: Dubfire | Solar Dance Arena | Burgas (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Dubfire electrifies with a stunning set of mesmerizing techno while a packed Solar Dance Arena goes mad on the beach of Burgas Bulgaria.

programme.title: Away To: The Warehouse with Stephan Jolk - By Late Knights & Creative State | Lebanon
programme.desc: Stephan Jolk lights up The Warehouse with his absorbing sounds.

programme.title: Ricardo Villalobos & Luciano | Love Family Park | Mainz (Germany)
programme.desc: Displaying all the skill and unique personalities that have entranced fans internationally for over a decade, Villalobos and Luciano bring the heat in this all-vinyl set.

programme.title: Vintage Culture | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Get ready for a sonic journey with Vintage Culture at Music On Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Carl Cox | Time Warp | Mannheim (Germany)
programme.desc: Oh yes Oh yes! The King of Clubs delivers a massive set yet again, this time to those party pilgrims from all over Europe who've made the journey to the Mecca of electronic music that is Time Warp in Mannheim Germany.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets at Notte Bianca | Valletta Ditch (Malta)
programme.desc: Tenishia's Chasing Sunsets at Notte Bianca in Valletta Ditch, Malta, delivers an enchanting blend of melodic beats and warm vibes.

programme.title: Willer (Spin Sum) | Neon Hour | Red Sugar Kerry Hotel | Hong Kong
programme.desc: Horizon presents : Willer (Spin Sum) - Neon Hour filmed at Red Sugar at Kerry Hotel Hong Kong Elegant visual productions blending arts & music in distinctive locations across Asia.

programme.title: Brennan Heart | Parookaville 2020 | NRW (Germany)
programme.desc: Brennan Heart unleashed pure hardstyle energy at Parookaville 2020 in NRW, Germany, delivering a powerhouse set filled with pounding kicks, euphoric melodies, and unstoppable energy.

programme.title: 3D (Dave Seaman, Danny Howells & Darren Emerson) | Arjaus | Argentina
programme.desc: A very special day for us receiving at home 3 legends of the electronic music scene.

programme.title: Away To: Byblos with Gaya - By Late Knights & Creative State | Beirut (Lebanon)
programme.desc: Gaya pumps things up in the Byblos theater.

programme.title: Darse | Ex NATO Base | Italy
programme.desc: Darse send melodic vibes into space from an Ex NATO Base in Italy.

programme.title: Away To: Athens with Echonomist - By Late Knights & Creative State | Greece
programme.desc: Greek native Echonomist crafts a soundscape of minimal through melodic to heat up the shores of Athens.

programme.title: Solomun | Loveland Festival at Sloterpark | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Get ready for an hour of deep and funky beats by the one and only Solomun from his stellar performance at Loveland festival!

programme.title: Armin van Buuren | Intense (The Final Show) at Ziggo Dome | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Experience the epic conclusion of Armin van Buurenâ€™s legendary â€œIntenseâ€ era with this electrifying live performance from Amsterdamâ€™s iconic Ziggo Dome. Feel the pulse of the crowd as Armin delivers mind-blowing trance anthems, cinematic visuals, and unforgettable energy.

programme.title: Marco Carola | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a sonic odyssey with techno pioneer Marco Carola at Music On Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Jay Lumen | Sziget Festival 2019 | Hungary
programme.desc: Jay Lumen Live at Sziget Festival 2019.
